name: Workflow Orchestrator
description: YAML/JSON-driven multi-step workflow orchestration for OpenClaw agents. Supports parallel execution, dependency management, retry logic, output gates, and partial resume.

workflowsDir.description: Directory containing workflow definition files (YAML/JSON). Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workflows/

runsDir.description: Directory where workflow run state files are stored. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workflow-runs/

baseDir.description: Base directory for resolving relative output file paths in workflow steps. Defaults to process.cwd().

concurrency.description: Maximum number of steps that can run in parallel within a single workflow. Default: 3.

notifyChannel.description: Channel ID or name to send step completion notifications. If omitted, notifications are suppressed.

sessionModel.description: Default model to use for spawned step sessions when a step doesn't specify its own model. Defaults to the OpenClaw default model.

pollIntervalMs.description: How often (in milliseconds) to poll session status for running steps. Default: 5000.
